task.question: During the montage, what color was the horse that the boy in yellow is riding?
initial_trace_steps: From 01:07-01:17, I noticed a few pictures and videos included children riding, playing, or touching horses. I noticed the first picture at 01:07 and the second picture at 01:09 were vintage pictures. I immediately took notice of the second picture with the boy in the top riding the horse at 01:09. I noticed the horse he was riding was white in color.
